metadata.description: Etendo Dev Assistant plugin marketplace — tools and skills for Etendo ERP development with Claude Code

plugins.name: dev-assistant
plugins.description: A comprehensive set of skills for Etendo ERP development — module creation, database changes, window configuration, Java scaffolding, builds, and more

plugins.name: etendo-workflow-manager
plugins.description: Manages the full Etendo development workflow — creating Jira issues, GitHub issues, branches, commits, and wiki documentation following Etendo conventions

plugins.name: fyso-team-sync
plugins.description: Sync a Fyso agent team to the local .claude/agents/ directory and verify the Etendo dev environment is ready

plugins.name: fyso-agents-creator
plugins.description: Create Fyso agent teams from natural language requirements
